---
title: "Research Highlights"
---

::: {.image-grid}
::: {.image-box}
<figure class="image-figure">
  <img src="work_fig/NE_cover_2025.png" alt="Nature Electronics cover">
  <figcaption>
    <div class="caption-description">Memristive SoC for signal processing</div>
    <div class="caption-link"><a href="https://www.nature.com/natelectron/volumes/8/issues/7">_Nature Electronics_ (Cover article, July 2025)</a></div>
  </figcaption>
</figure>
:::

::: {.image-box}
<figure class="image-figure">
  <img src="work_fig/ne_banner.jpeg" alt="Nature Electronics CeNN chip">
  <figcaption>
    <div class="caption-description">CMOS-based cellular neural network</div>
    <div class="caption-link"><a href="https://www.nature.com/articles/s41928-025-01559-z">_Nature Electronics_ (Website banner and editorial)</a></div>
  </figcaption>
</figure>
:::

::: {.image-box}
<figure class="image-figure">
  <img src="work_fig/NS_sensing.svg" alt="Nature Sensor News">
  <figcaption>
    <div class="caption-description">Neuromorphic sensing system</div>
    <div class="caption-link"><a href="https://www.nature.com/articles/s44460-025-00025-9"> _Nature Sensors_ (Reported in News & Views)</a></div>
  </figcaption>
</figure>
:::

::: {.image-box}
<figure class="image-figure">
  <img src="work_fig/NREE_dir.svg" alt="Review paper in Nature Reviews Electrical Engineering">
  <figcaption>
    <div class="caption-description">Memristor-based hardware accelerators for AI</div>
    <div class="caption-link"><a href="https://www.nature.com/articles/s44287-024-00037-6">_Nature Reviews Electrical Engineering_ (Invited review)</a></div>
  </figcaption>
</figure>
:::
